turns.user_message: I used to feel so sharp and ready to go. Now I just feel foggy and slow all the time.
That fog never really lifts anymore, and I can't focus on anything. I miss how my mind used to work.
My thoughts are just static now, and I can't remember the last time I had a clear idea. I feel completely empty.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens by contrasting with how things used to be.
